login.bienvenido: Welcome to the most dynamic career hub

mentor.saludoInicial: Hello, I'm ready to talk about your vocation. Tell me about yourself and let's begin.

laboratorios.instalacionesClaseMundial: World-class facilities for your professional training

hospitalSimulado.name: Simulated Hospital
hospitalSimulado.desc: Innovative environment combining theory and practice with advanced last-generation simulators.

labOrganizacion.name: Lab. Human Body Organization and Function
labOrganizacion.desc: Innovative space with advanced technology and 3D virtual dissection.

salaSimulacion.name: Complex Gynecobstetric Simulation Room
salaSimulacion.desc: Space to practice gynecology, obstetrics and neonatology with real simulators.

salaDiseccion.name: AR and VR Dissection Room
salaDiseccion.desc: Innovation center with augmented and virtual reality technology for dissection without cadavers.

tallerArquitectura.name: Architecture Workshop
tallerArquitectura.desc: Specialized environment equipped for design and model-making based on class projects.

salaBIM.name: BIM Room
salaBIM.desc: Space with advanced technology and 3D models for construction and architectural design projects.

salaAudiencias.name: Courtroom
salaAudiencias.desc: Space for practical activities where students simulate real court proceedings.

salaDesignThinking.name: Design Thinking Room
salaDesignThinking.desc: Collaborative space to develop innovative solutions to complex legal problems.

labTecnicasDieteticas.name: Dietetic Techniques Laboratory
labTecnicasDieteticas.desc: Food safety innovation center with advanced technology for nutrition and dietetics.

labProcesosIndustriales.name: Industrial Processes Laboratory
labProcesosIndustriales.desc: Educational environment with four production plants: craft beer, nectars, snacks and more.

labConcretoSuelos.name: Concrete Technology and Soil Mechanics Lab
labConcretoSuelos.desc: Perform standardized tests on concrete, soil and asphalt with state-of-the-art equipment.

labHidraulica.name: Hydraulics Laboratory
labHidraulica.desc: Laboratory to study water behavior in channels, pipes and hydraulic structures.

salaBIM.name: BIM Room
salaBIM.desc: Construction information modeling with 3D technology for civil engineering projects.

salaMacs.name: Mac Room
salaMacs.desc: Specialized environments with Apple equipment for software development, design and multimedia.

salaDesignThinking.name: Design Thinking Room
salaDesignThinking.desc: Collaborative space for design thinking and technological innovation.

labMecatronica.name: Mechatronics Laboratory
labMecatronica.desc: Multidisciplinary laboratory for the design and development of intelligent robotic systems.

camaraGesell.name: Gesell Chamber
camaraGesell.desc: Room designed for psychological interviews, clinical evaluations and therapeutic interventions.

salaDesignThinking.name: Design Thinking Room
salaDesignThinking.desc: Collaborative space to develop innovative solutions in mental health and wellbeing.

tallerAudiovisual.name: Audiovisual Production Workshop
tallerAudiovisual.desc: Professional space equipped with cyclorama, chroma key, switcher and cinema cameras.

cabinaAudio.name: Audio Production Booth
cabinaAudio.desc: Space specifically designed for recording and mixing high-quality professional sound.

salaMacs.name: Mac Room
salaMacs.desc: Specialized environments with Apple equipment for graphic design, editing and digital marketing.

hospitalSimulado.name: Simulated Hospital
hospitalSimulado.desc: Innovative environment with advanced simulators for medicine and health sciences.

salaAudiencias.name: Courtroom
salaAudiencias.desc: Simulation of real court proceedings for law students.

tallerArquitectura.name: Architecture Workshop
tallerArquitectura.desc: Design and models for architectural projects.

salaDesignThinking.name: Design Thinking Room
salaDesignThinking.desc: Collaborative space for innovation and creative thinking.

salaBIM.name: BIM Room
salaBIM.desc: 3D modeling of construction and architecture projects.

tallerAudiovisual.name: Audiovisual Production Workshop
tallerAudiovisual.desc: Professional video production with cyclorama and chroma key.
